# Mercury Measurement

**Summary**: The measurement of mercury concentrations in sediment to identify volcanic signals.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] used mercury concentration measurements via DMA-80 even Direct Mercury Analyzer to identify Deccan Trap volcanic influence.

## Key Results and Findings

- Mercury peaks of 5.3 ppb were identified at the K/Pg boundary in the Contessa Highway section. ([[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024, p. 122]])
